_note: Two layers. PRESENCE questions establish which library components this house has (the tool starts blind). CONDITION questions assess components confirmed present, filling gaps photos cannot resolve. Then constraints intake.

questions.prompt: Do you have a home inspection report?
Is the deck structure (posts, joists) sound?
Are more than a quarter of the deck boards soft or rotten?
Are the railings loose or are risers open?
Does the garage door open and close normally on its own power?
questions.triggers: GAR-01 present (always ask when a garage door exists)

questions.prompt: Is there standing water in the crawlspace now, or only past moisture?
Are the kitchen cabinet boxes solid, even if the fronts look dated?
Is the primary bath vanity original and dated?
Is there cigarette or other heavy smoke odor in the home?
questions.note: Heavy smoke triggers BOTH REM-01 (remediation) and DUCT-01 (duct cleaning) as Floor-eligible.

questions.prompt: In the attic or around the electrical panel, do you see any exposed wires, open boxes without covers, or missing outlet/switch cover plates?
questions.note: Blind-tool limit: hidden junction boxes may not be seller-visible. This catches what is visible; an inspection catches the rest. Confidence flagged lower without inspection.

questions.prompt: On the porch or deck stairs, are any handrails loose or missing, or are there open gaps between the steps?
questions.note: Railing/riser hazards are FHA/VA safety items. If DECK-01 and PRCH-01 share one staircase, capture.py sets shared_structure so floor.py counts the cost once.

constraints_intake.prompt: Roughly what's left on your mortgage?
constraints_intake.help: Include everything owed against the home: first mortgage, second, HELOC, liens. Unpaid property taxes or judgments belong here too.

constraints_intake.prompt: Could you pay for repairs up front?
Are you prepared to finance the cost of repairs?
How soon do you need to sell?

presence_questions.prompt: Does your home have a deck or raised porch?
Does your home sit on a crawlspace, basement, or slab?
Is there a garage with a powered door?
How many bathrooms, and which is the primary?
Roughly how old is the heating and cooling system?
Roughly how old is the water heater?
Roughly how old is the roof?
Is there a front porch or exterior stairs with railings?
Can you access the electrical panel and attic to look for visible wiring issues?

_presence_note: Photos pre-fill presence where visible (a deck photo sets DECK-01 present). Presence questions confirm or fill the rest. Only components marked present get condition questions.
